recommendations.title: 7 Minutes
recommendations.overview: When three young criminals lose a stash of drugs, they end up owing money to a ruthless drug lord. With time running out, they plan a daring robbery to raise the cash to settle the debt.

recommendations.title: Brimstone
recommendations.overview: In the menacing inferno of the old North-American West, Liz is a genuine survivor who is hunted by a vengeful preacher for a crime she didn’t commit.

recommendations.title: A Good Woman Is Hard to Find
recommendations.overview: The recently widowed mother of two, Sarah, is desperate to know who murdered her husband in front of her young son, rendering him mute. Coerced into helping a low-life drug dealer stash narcotics stolen from the local Mr. Big, she's forced into takin

recommendations.title: Heroin(e)
recommendations.overview: This documentary follows three women — a fire chief, a judge, and a street missionary — as they battle West Virginia's devastating opioid epidemic.

recommendations.title: Split Second
recommendations.genres: Science Fiction, Action, Crime, Thriller, Horror
recommendations.overview: In a flooded future London, Detective Harley Stone hunts a serial killer who murdered his partner and has haunted him ever since — but he soon discovers what he is hunting might not be human.

recommendations.title: Wrong Turn
recommendations.overview: Chris crashes into a carload of other young people, and the group of stranded motorists is soon lost in the woods of West Virginia, where they're hunted by three cannibalistic mountain men who are grossly disfigured by generations of inbreeding.

recommendations.title: Come and Find Me
recommendations.overview: When his girlfriend goes missing, David must track down her whereabouts after he realizes she's not who she was pretending to be.

recommendations.title: Even Angels Eat Beans
recommendations.overview: Two mismatched buddies are mistaken for mob enforcers in Depression-era America.

recommendations.title: Wrong Place
recommendations.overview: A methamphetamine cook hunts down the former police chief of a small town in order to silence him before he can deliver eyewitness testimony against his family, but ultimately finds himself up against more than he had bargained for.

recommendations.title: Hunter Will Get You
recommendations.overview: L'Alpagueur is a free-lance spy from the French secret agency. He's put on the investigation about L'epervier, a serial-killer who employs young boys to help him robbing banks before killing them.
